metadata.description: Best practice engineering skills for open source development, optimized for Rust, WebAssembly, and knowledge graph systems

plugins.name: terraphim-engineering-skills
plugins.description: 42 specialized engineering skills for open source Rust/WebAssembly development including architecture design, code review, security auditing, performance, requirements traceability, acceptance/visual testing, disciplined development, judge 5-level verdict, native RLM (terraphim-rlm, adf-orchestrate, kg-rlm-ingest, deterministic-rlm-review), and community engagement
